Amended Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael C. Hall, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Mi-Ryung Ham, dba MF Properties. Shawn D. Parrish, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party:

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as modified: Plaintiff Mi-Ryung Ham's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents is granted. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified in a privilege log. Responses shall be served on or before November 26, 2007. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied.

MODIFICATION:
**RESPONSES SHALL BE SERVED ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 21, 2007 BY 4 PM.

Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
